creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
> Some ports like libreoffice and ntopng are requiring us to use mysql instead
Given the way the ports system works; you'd probably get more traction
by submitting a pr(1) with each of the ports that you take issue with.
As it is, it appears that you're suggesting that this is a matter for
portmgr@. Which I think is incorrect.
